headline: Can Corning's Multibillion-Dollar AI Deal With Amazon Lift Its Shares?
summary: GLW inks a multibillion-dollar, long-term Amazon deal to supply optical fiber and connectivity for U.S. data centers while expanding its North Carolina production and creating jobs.

headline: Will Oracle's AI Infrastructure Momentum Drive Results in Q4?
summary: ORCL's AI deals, cloud growth targets and $553B backlog set up fiscal Q4, but heavy capex, debt and restructuring costs may pressure margins.
